extraction_notes: T3 tier data: Wikipedia source provides minimal level design detail. Inferred patterns from review commentary (GamePro's notes on stiff controls, quick timer, puzzle difficulty; Next Generation's description of traditional side-scrolling gameplay). No detailed spatial structure, element progression sequence, or rhythm data available in source material.
data_limitations: Source material focuses on reception and metadata rather than level design documentation. Specific information about element introduction sequences, spatial conventions, dead ends, and detailed pacing metrics unavailable. Tension/relief cycle timing cannot be quantified from available source.
